name: koishi-plugin-chatluna-photo
description: Let a ChatLuna character bot take and send photos (NovelAI image gen) on its own decision, via a [[photo:...]] reply-marker it writes in its own output — with a scene-planner LLM pass, a local self-curated album (recall/reroll/delete), and an optional always-on camera mode.
author: 妖祀

description.zh: 让 ChatLuna 角色 bot 自主决定「拍张照片发出去」：模型在自己输出（含 <think>）里写 [[photo:意图]] 标记，插件带外读取→scene-planner 独立 LLM 调用扩写成 danbooru 富提示词→NovelAI 生图→发到当前会话。不走原生工具调用（不打断角色解析）。附带：本地相册（默认全存、按角色心意清理、[[photo:描述|recall]] 跨会话召回）、回复照片重roll/删除、[[camera:on/off]] 摄像模式（开着每条回复自动配 POV 自拍，计入限流额度）。⚠ 需要给 koishi-plugin-chatluna-character 打一个小补丁暴露 chatluna_character/raw-response 事件（见 README），npm i 后补丁会被冲掉需重打。
description.en: Lets a ChatLuna character bot decide on its own to take & send a photo: the model writes a [[photo:intent]] marker in its own output (incl. <think>); the plugin reads it out-of-band, expands it into a rich danbooru prompt via a separate scene-planner LLM call, generates with NovelAI and sends it. No native tool call (never breaks the character parse). Includes a local self-curated album (keep-all, in-character pruning, cross-chat recall), reply-to-photo reroll/delete, and a [[camera:on/off]] auto-selfie mode (rate-limited). ⚠ Requires a small patch on koishi-plugin-chatluna-character exposing the chatluna_character/raw-response event (see README); re-apply after every npm install.
